profile.name: A B C dot D E F

transcript.text: Namaste, my name is Rupa Devi, calling from the I-C-C-C, Uttar Pradesh. Welcome to Gyarah Das. We support mothers through pregnancy until the child turns two. May I take a few details to support you and connect you with health and nutrition services?
Thank you. Could you please tell me your full name?
Thank you for sharing that. I'll note down your name as A B C dot D E F. Now, could you tell me your age, please?
Got it, thank you. Could you share your mobile number now, please?
No problem, we can come back to that later if needed. Could you tell me which village you live in?
It’s okay, take your time. You can share whenever you're ready. Could you tell me the name of your village?
